name: filesystem
description: Inspect files and directories. Auto-detects CSV, JSON, and Markdown formats and returns structure-specific metadata.

inspect.description: Inspect a file or directory. For directories, inspects all supported files (.csv, .json, .md). Returns format-specific structure: CSV (rows, columns, sample), JSON (structure, count, schema, sample), Markdown (headings, linkCount, codeBlockCount).

path.description: Absolute path to a file (.csv, .json, .md) or directory
